mapper.select:
select sd.dept_id from sys_dept sd where sd.del_flag = '0' and sd.dept_id in ( select srd.dept_id from sys_role_dept srd left join sys_role sr on sr.role_id = srd.role_id where srd.role_id = #{roleId} and sr.status = '0' )
and sd.dept_id not in ( select parent_id from sys_dept where dept_id in ( select srd.dept_id from sys_role_dept srd left join sys_role sr on sr.role_id = srd.role_id where srd.role_id = #{roleId} and sr.status = '0' ) )
order by sd.parent_id asc, sd.order_num asc
